title: Highlight item lines more clearly
excerpt: When I get a notification email I click the link to direct me to the pulse/item line on the Monday board. When I click the link, it brings me to the board with the pulse highlighted, however, I find that the pulse is not…

posts.author: sku (sk)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I get a notification email I click the link to direct me to the pulse/item line on the Monday board. When I click the link, it brings me to the board with the pulse highlighted, however, I find that the pulse is not highlighted clearly/prominently/dark enough so that I cannot tell which pulse is being highlighted.
This is an issue that I encounter upwards of 10x/day. Can you correct this?

posts.author: Noelie2000 (Noel Pusey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Totally agree. Death by shades of light and pastal.

I would rather dayglo orange than something wishy-washy that plays to the aesthetic.
